message.content:
@startuml
!theme plain

class "Artist" {
  [E]
  id : VARCHAR
  name : VARCHAR
  instagram : VARCHAR
  facebook : VARCHAR
  twitter : VARCHAR
  wikipedia : VARCHAR
  bio : TEXT
}

class "Album" {
  [E]
  id : VARCHAR
  title : VARCHAR
  release : VARCHAR
  image : VARCHAR
}

class "Song" {
  [E]
  id : VARCHAR
  album_id : VARCHAR
  title : VARCHAR
  duration : INT
}

class "PlaylistCategory" {
  [E]
  id : VARCHAR
  name : VARCHAR
  image : VARCHAR
  icon : VARCHAR
}

class "Playlist" {
  [E]
  id : VARCHAR
  name : VARCHAR
  description : TEXT
  image : VARCHAR
  category_id : VARCHAR
  user_id : VARCHAR
}

class "PodcastCategory" {
  [E]
  id : VARCHAR
  name : VARCHAR
  image : VARCHAR
  icon : VARCHAR
}

class "Podcast" {
  [E]
  id : VARCHAR
  --
  name : VARCHAR
  about : TEXT
  image : VARCHAR
  category_id : VARCHAR
  user_id : VARCHAR
}

class "Episode" {
  [E]
  id : VARCHAR
  podcast_id : VARCHAR
  title : VARCHAR
  description : TEXT
  published_at : DATE
  duration : INT
}

class "User" {
  [E]
}

class "Concert" {
  [E]
}

@enduml
